scripts.dev: sh -c 'for p in $(lsof -ti tcp:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN); do kill -9 "$p"; done >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; rm -rf .next; next dev -p 3000'
scripts.dev:fast: sh -c 'for p in $(lsof -ti tcp:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN); do kill -9 "$p"; done >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; rm -rf .next; next dev -p 3000'
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n site,studio -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:site" "npm run dev:studio"
scripts.sanity:seed:upsert: npm run sanity:seed:prepare && cd studio-test && npx sanity documents create ../sanity-seed.json --replace --dataset production
scripts.sanity:seed:milestone:upsert: npm run sanity:seed:milestone:prepare && cd studio-test && npx sanity documents create ../sanity-seed-milestone.json --replace --dataset production
scripts.sanity:products:assign-stock: cd studio-test && npx sanity exec scripts/assign-stock-numbers.ts --with-user-token
scripts.sanity:page:financing:upsert: cd studio-test && npx sanity exec scripts/upsert-financing-page.ts --with-user-token
scripts.sanity:seo:upsert: cd studio-test && npx sanity exec scripts/upsert-seo-fields.ts --with-user-token
scripts.build:static: STATIC_EXPORT=true NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH=test next build && node scripts/fix-image-paths.js
